title: Dispersion loss counteracts embedding condensation in small language models
summary: 该帖子探讨了小型语言模型中嵌入向量过度聚集（embedding condensation）的问题，并提出分散损失（dispersion loss）可有效对抗这一现象，从而提升模型性能。

title: Jamesob's guide to running SOTA LLMs locally
summary: 该帖子介绍了如何在本地运行最先进的大语言模型（SOTA LLMs）的实用指南，亮点在于提供了从硬件配置到模型部署的完整步骤，适合希望脱离云端、自主掌控AI的用户。

title: Leanstral 1.5: Proof Abundance for All
summary: Mistral 发布 Leanstral 1.5，旨在通过AI辅助大幅降低形式化证明的门槛，让更多人能参与数学定理的机器验证。

title: Wordgard: In-browser rich-text editor from the creator of ProseMirror
summary: Wordgard 是 ProseMirror 作者推出的浏览器端富文本编辑器，看点在于其继承了 ProseMirror 的架构设计，并可能带来更简洁的 API 和更好的性能。

title: GLM5.2 on AMD MI355X at 2626 tok/s/node at over 2x lower cost than Blackwell
summary: GLM5.2在AMD MI355X上实现了单节点2626 tok/s的推理速度，且成本比英伟达Blackwell低两倍以上，展示了国产模型与AMD硬件的强劲竞争力。

title: 60% Fable cost cut by converting code to images and having the model OCR it
summary: 通过将代码转换为图像并让模型进行OCR识别，将Fable成本降低了60%，看点在于这种逆向思维的成本优化方法。

title: Show HN: ContextCodeCache in Rust
summary: 一个用Rust实现的上下文代码缓存工具，旨在提升代码执行效率，适合对性能敏感的场景。

title: Ask HN: Is anyone experimenting with different ways of using LLMs for coding?
text:
I'm a bit annoyed by the feeling that we're kind of stuck when it comes to using LLMs for programming.

I use Claude Code and Codex, but I haven't been able to enter flow state like I can when I hand write code.

This is kind of ironic to me since AI should be a bicycle for the mind, but right now it feels like a bicycle that just brakes abruptly every couple minutes. I stop, wait, review, prompt again.

Is there anyone exploring something fundamentally different than the prompt response loop we have today?

I actually think the idea of a tab model is directionally better than prompt response.

Would love to hear about any startups, personal experiments, etc.
summary: 该帖探讨了当前使用LLM编程时频繁中断、难以进入心流状态的痛点，并质疑现有“提示-响应”循环模式，期待更流畅的交互方式（如标签页模型）。
